offsetTop.description: Triggered when the specified offset is reached from the top of the window
offsetTop.title: offsetTop

offsetBottom.description: Triggered when the specified offset is reached from the bottom of the window
offsetBottom.title: offsetBottom

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when fixed state changes
onChange.title: onChange

target.title: target
